test_qa18_blocked_api_shows_no_white_screen
Test function
test_qa18_blocked_api_shows_no_white_screen
What it checks
If the main API is unreachable, the page must still render SOMETHING (loader, error message, fallback content) — never a completely blank white page.

Failed: Test qa18 offline does not crash page
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa18_offline_does_not_crash_page 2026-06-11 04:36:57 15.00s
What this test was checking
Going offline mid-session must not produce uncaught JS errors — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Going offline mid-session must not produce uncaught JS errors.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
